历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 8851 (2021), 29158 (2023), 12931 (2024), and 19645 (2025). The abnormal value of 74585 in 2022 due to a gap has been excluded. Rankings have fluctuated significantly in recent 3 years: 29158 in 2023 → 12931 in 2024 (a large forward shift of 16227 places) → 19645 in 2025 (a backward shift of 6714 places). The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 19645. The enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province Physics Category: 96 in 2021, 94 in 2022, 86 in 2023, 87 in 2024, 117 in 2025, and 116 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a decrease of 1 person, a slight reduction of about 0.85%, which slightly eases competition and is expected to reduce the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks approximately 40th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 38–40 range in recent years, belonging to the national Top 50 comprehensive universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'slightly positive', with major events including a master's graduate thanking the security department, demonstrating humanistic care. There are 6 positive incidents and 2 negative ones. Douyin popularity ranks 53/106, with an evaluation of 'relatively hot', and a comprehensive popularity of about 589,600. No obvious admission gaps have been recorded. The overall reputation is positive, which mildly boosts application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Grass Science A+, Ecology A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, and Biology A-. Chemistry A- directly corresponds to majors like Chemistry and Applied Chemistry enrolled in Anhui. Ecology A+ corresponds to majors like Ecology and Biological Sciences. Geography A- corresponds to Geographic Science. Grass Science A+ corresponds to Grass Science. The strong disciplines match well with the enrolled majors, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science (recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Clinical Medicine (recommended) and other popular Physics Category majors continue to have high social popularity. Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials (clearly discouraged), Civil Engineering and Architecture (differentiated and wait-and-see) have low popularity. The total number of Anhui Province college entrance exam registrants in 2026 is about 451,000, slightly down from about 462,000 in 2025. Physics Category candidates, estimated at about 69.4% of the total, are about 313,000, a slight decrease from 320,800 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou City, Gansu Province, far from Anhui Province, and is a 985 university in the northwest region. Its enrollment plan in Anhui Physics Category is 116, a relatively large scale, which has some appeal to Anhui candidates. However, the preference for the northwest region is relatively weaker than for universities of the same level in the east/central regions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating trend of historical rankings (a large forward shift in 2024 followed by a significant backward shift in 2025), a slight reduction in the 2026 plan by 0.85% slightly easing competition, a slightly positive reputation boosting application enthusiasm, a slight decrease in Anhui Physics Category candidates easing competition, and the stable appeal of the 985/211 level to candidates, the ranking is expected to shift slightly forward based on the 2025 baseline of 19645. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 19514, with a range of 19014–20014.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 19014–20014, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 19200), you can focus on sprinting for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Clinical Medicine. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 19800), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors and use Tier 3 majors as safety. Lanzhou University's Grass Science A+ is a top national discipline; candidates interested in agriculture and forestry can pay special attention to Grass Science (Base Class).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 40th, with stable rankings in the 38–40 range in recent years, belonging to the national Top 50 comprehensive universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'slightly positive', with a major event being a master's graduate thanking the security department in their thesis acknowledgments for allowing a waste-picking elderly person to enter the campus, showcasing campus humanistic care. There are 6 positive public opinion items and 2 negative ones. Douyin popularity ranks 53rd out of 106, with an evaluation of 'relatively hot', and a comprehensive popularity of approximately 589,600. No obvious admission gaps have been recorded. Overall reputation is positive, which mildly boosts application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Grass Science A+, Ecology A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, Biology A-, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above. Grass Science and Ecology are at the national top level. Although there is no direct discipline mapping with the liberal arts majors such as History, Chinese Language and Literature, and Political Science that the university recruits in Anhui, the overall academic foundation of the university is attractive to candidates. Popular liberal arts majors like Law (recommended) and Chinese Language and Literature (recommended) are socially hot, while Teacher Training/Education (differentiated observation) has stable popularity. 专业热度与地域.text: Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou City, Gansu Province, far from Anhui Province, and is a 985 university in the northwest region. 预测结论.text: Considering the slight backward trend in historical rankings over the past 3 years with narrow fluctuations, the small expansion of 4.5% in the 2026 plan slightly intensifying competition, the slightly positive reputation boosting application enthusiasm, the slight decrease in History Category candidates in Anhui easing competition, and the stable appeal of the 985/211 level to candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 2198, the ranking is expected to shift back slightly.
